mapper.jsonStringBodyContent: {"model":"kimi-k2","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Write a professional LinkedIn post about one of these topics (pick randomly): AI trends, coding tips, student life in tech, project updates, career advice. Keep it under 150 words, professional tone, end with 3 relevant hashtags. IMPORTANT: End your response after the hashtags. Do not add anything else. No URLs, no links, no promotional text."}],"max_tokens":300,"stream":false}

contentType.label: application/jsonEnter data in the JSON format, as a string or using a data structure.

inputMethod.label: JSON stringEnter the JSON body as a raw text string. If values contain JSON reserved characters, you must escape them manually.

authenticationType.label: No authenticationUse when no credentials are required for the request.

expect.name: stopOnHttpError
expect.label: Return error if HTTP request fails

expect.name: shareCookies
expect.label: Share cookies with other HTTP modules

nested.help: For example, `urn:li:person:1234`. Only mention someone with a connection to the authenticated user.
nested.name: urn
nested.label: Entity URN

mapper.jsonStringBodyContent:
{
  "model": "sd3",
  "prompt": "High quality LinkedIn editorial illustration about {{40.text}}, modern SaaS startup scene, diverse professionals collaborating with technology, laptops, dashboards, analytics charts, AI tools, creative workspace, minimal desk setup, flat vector illustration style, Notion style graphics, Stripe style illustration, Canva style artwork, clean UI inspired design, smooth soft gradients, pastel but vibrant color palette, rounded shapes, geometric elements, friendly modern characters, balanced composition, lots of white space, professional social media artwork, SaaS marketing illustration, productivity app design aesthetic, unique composition, varied camera angle, random office layout",
  "cfg_scale": 7,
  "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
  "steps": 32,
  "negative_prompt": "text, watermark, logo, letters, words, blurry, noisy, distorted, messy composition"
}
